evidence: Reviewed current uncommitted F-0029 implementation with focus on prior blockers: active/stale sending duplicate sends, timeout retry, and replay text mismatch.

packages/db/src/telegram-egress.ts:295 markSending claims only pending/retry_scheduled rows; packages/db/src/telegram-egress.ts:380 listReadyToRetry selects only pending/retry_scheduled rows, so ambiguous sending rows are not automatically replayed.
apps/core/src/actions/tool-gateway.ts:1290 sends durable outbox text from sending.textJson; apps/core/src/actions/tool-gateway.ts:1313 records telegram_api_timeout as terminal failure.

notes: PASS: prior code-review blockers are cleared. Active or stale sending rows are no longer automatic retry candidates, Telegram timeout is terminal failure, and replay transport uses the durable outbox text as authoritative.
